```tsx
function App() {
  const [state, setState] = React.useState({ display: "0", expr: "" });
  const [busy, setBusy] = React.useState(false);

  const dispatch = async (action, payload) => {
    setBusy(true);
    const intent =
      "calculator action '" +
      action +
      "': state shape { display: string, expr: string }; given input { state, payload } return { data: { state } } with the same shape, updating it like a real calculator; payload is the pressed key";
    const res = await runHandler(intent, { state, payload });
    if (res && res.data && res.data.state) {
      setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, ...res.data.state }));
    }
    setBusy(false);
  };

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)",
        color: "var(--color-text)",
        padding: "1rem",
        borderRadius: "0.5rem",
        maxWidth: "300px",
        fontFamily: "monospace",
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)",
          border: "1px solid var(--color-accent)",
          padding: "1rem",
          marginBottom: "1rem",
          fontSize: "1.5rem",
          textAlign: "right",
          borderRadius: "0.25rem",
          minHeight: "2rem",
        }}
      >
        {state.display}
      </div>

      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4, 1fr)", gap: "0.5rem" }}>
        {["7", "8", "9", "/", "4", "5", "6", "*", "1", "2", "3", "-", "0", ".", "=", "+"].map(
          (btn) => (
            <button
              key={btn}
              onClick={() => dispatch(btn, btn)}
              disabled={busy}
              style={{
                padding: "1rem",
                fontSize: "1rem",
                backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)",
                color: "var(--color-text)",
                border: "none",
                borderRadius: "0.25rem",
                cursor: busy ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
                opacity: busy ? 0.5 : 1,
              }}
            >
              {btn}
            </button>
          )
        )}
      </div>

      <button
        onClick={() => dispatch("clear", null)}
        disabled={busy}
        style={{
          width: "100%",
          marginTop: "0.5rem",
          padding: "0.75rem",
          fontSize: "1rem",
          backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)",
          color: "var(--color-text)",
          border: "none",
          borderRadius: "0.25rem",
          cursor: busy ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
          opacity: busy ? 0.5 : 1,
        }}
      >
        C
      </button>

      {busy && (
        <div style={{ marginTop: "0.5rem", fontSize: "0.875rem", color: "var(--color-accent)" }}>
          computing...
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```
